description: Testing initial display of radio buttons in both add and edit forms

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default slected value
+ List of values
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default slected value: DB's value
+ List of values
...

description: Testing radio button selection functionality across different positions

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when select a value:
+ Select the first value 
+ Select any value
+ Select the last value
expected_result:
+ The selected value is Check ON. Other values are unselected 
+ Process with selected value successfully.

description: Testing hover interactions and database synchronization for active radio buttons

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when hover on each part of each active radio button
expected_result: Mouse becomes hand icon and can select [Base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when hover on each part of each active radio button
expected_result: Mouse becomes hand icon and can select [Base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when selecting value is edited from DB
Check operation when selecting value is deleted from DB

description: Testing interactions with disabled radio buttons

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when hover on each part of each disabled radio button
expected_result: Mouse not becomes hand icon [Base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when hover on each part of each disabled radio button
expected_result: Mouse not becomes hand icon [Base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when select an disabled radio button
expected_result: Can not select that radio button

description: Testing keyboard navigation through radio buttons

expected_result: Go to Left to Right, from Up to Down as normal and don't go to disable value (skip each value of radio button)

item_type: Edit radio button value by Inspect

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when changed value of radio button on client web (inspect element)
Ex: Not select any value/ Select all options/ Change value of options/ Change text of options)
expected_result: Can not update wrong value to DB

description: Testing backend configuration changes and their effects on frontend

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation of frontend after change config on backend [base on each spec]
expected_result:
+ Change default value list and selected value correctly corresponding to backend setting
+ Operation of radio button is correct after change config.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation if change config on backend while selecting value on frontend page [base on each spec]
expected_result:
+ Can change config on backend successfully. 
+ Display notification to frontend [base on each spec]
+ Operation of radio button is correct after reload.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation if change config on backend while selecting value on frontend page [base on each spec]
expected_result:
+ Can change config on backend successfully. 
+ Display correct error message when submit on frontend.
